name: Kentucky Bourbon Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Fresh sweet potatoes, cooked until soft and then peeled, can be substituted for the vacuum packed ones. Do not use drained, canned in syrup as they are too moist.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (°F).
Put the sweet potatoes in a large heavy saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until heated through.
Mash the sweet potatoes. Add sugar, bourbon, butter, and vanilla; beat until well blended. Pour into a 2-quart, shallow baking dish. Sprinkle marshmallows over top.
Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes, or until marshmallows are golden brown.
